abilities.name: #1 World Champion
abilities.text:
Whenever Walrus Champion deals damage to an enemy monster with a Basic Attack, give them a Championship Belt Token.

Walrus Champion can only gain 1 Championship Belt Token per enemy monster they deal damage to per turn.

For every Championship Belt Token they have, add +3 to all Attack Dice rolls.

Walrus Champion can have a maximum of 5 Championship Belt Tokens.
